block_00: 7 Mistakes Novice Traders Make (Please, Avoid Them)
block_01: Trading is a complex and tricky venture, and novice traders can (and often do) make mistakes that lead to losses. We decided to compile a list of the most common mistakes along with advice on how to avoid them.
block_02: Read this article to find out what you should and shouldn’t do in your trading days.
block_04: How to Set up and Trade With Donchian Channels, Unique Volatility Indicator?
block_05: Donchian Channels is a volatility indicator that can help you to determine optimal entry and exit points. It also provides an insight into the volatility of the asset and can be used on its own or together with other tools. Learn more about it in our blog.
block_07: How to Find Optimal Entry Points with Market Momentum?
block_08: Market momentum is a fundamental trading concept. It is based on the idea that the asset will continue moving (for a while) in the direction of the trend. And working with momentum can yield to you optimal entry points. Read on how to do it in this piece.
